widgets.title: Health Score by Country
widgets.description: Average health score aggregated by country for all accounts.
widgets.dataKey: SELECT "country" AS country, CAST(AVG("health_score") AS DOUBLE) AS value FROM "t_saas_metrics" GROUP BY "country" ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 250

widgets.title: Nps Score by Country
widgets.description: Average NPS score grouped by country for all accounts.
widgets.dataKey: SELECT "country" AS label, CAST(AVG("nps_score") AS DOUBLE) AS value FROM "t_saas_metrics" GROUP BY "country" ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 25

widgets.title: Health Score Distribution by Nps Category
widgets.description: Average health score grouped by NPS category showing distribution proportions.
widgets.dataKey: SELECT "nps_category" AS label, CAST(AVG("health_score") AS DOUBLE) AS value FROM "t_saas_metrics" GROUP BY "nps_category" ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 8

widgets.title: Health Score Over Signup Date
widgets.description: Average health score trend over time based on signup month.
widgets.dataKey: SELECT CAST(date_trunc('month', "signup_date") AS VARCHAR) AS x, CAST(AVG("health_score") AS DOUBLE) AS value FROM "t_saas_metrics" GROUP BY date_trunc('month', "signup_date") ORDER BY x ASC LIMIT 500

widgets.title: Country Composition by Nps Category
widgets.description: Stacked bar chart showing the count of accounts per country segmented by NPS category to visualize the distribution of customer satisfaction across countries.
widgets.dataKey: SELECT "country" AS label, "nps_category" AS "group", CAST(COUNT(*) AS DOUBLE) AS value FROM "t_saas_metrics" GROUP BY label, "group" ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 25

widgets.title: Nps Category Ranked by Nps Score
widgets.description: Average NPS Score per NPS Category, ranked descending
widgets.dataKey: SELECT "nps_category" AS label, CAST(AVG("nps_score") AS DOUBLE) AS value FROM "t_saas_metrics" GROUP BY "nps_category" ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 25

widgets.title: Country × Nps Category Heatmap
widgets.description: Heatmap showing the average NPS score by country and NPS category.
widgets.dataKey: SELECT "country" AS row, "nps_category" AS col, CAST(AVG("nps_score") AS DOUBLE) AS value FROM "t_saas_metrics" WHERE "nps_category" IS NOT NULL AND "country" IS NOT NULL GROUP BY row, col ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 400

widgets.title: Nps Score Volume Over Signup Date
widgets.description: Shows the total NPS score aggregated by month of signup date to visualize volume trends over time.
widgets.dataKey: SELECT CAST(date_trunc('month', "signup_date") AS VARCHAR) AS "x", CAST(SUM("nps_score") AS DOUBLE) AS "value" FROM "t_saas_metrics" GROUP BY date_trunc('month', "signup_date") ORDER BY "x" ASC LIMIT 500

widgets.title: Multi-Metric Profile by Country
widgets.description: Compare average key SaaS metrics across countries to profile market segments.
widgets.dataKey: SELECT "country" AS axis, CAST(AVG("mrr") AS DOUBLE) AS value FROM "t_saas_metrics" GROUP BY "country" ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 12

widgets.title: Health Score vs Nps Score by Country
widgets.description: Compare average Health Score and average NPS Score across countries.
widgets.dataKey: SELECT "country" AS label, CAST(AVG("health_score") AS DOUBLE) AS value1, CAST(AVG("nps_score") AS DOUBLE) AS value2 FROM "t_saas_metrics" GROUP BY "country" ORDER BY (value1 + value2) DESC LIMIT 20
